title: Dontcry
description: Adds unique stalkers and monsters inspired by creatures commonly seen in YouTube horror content. Experience new threats, suspenseful encounters, and original hostile mobs in your Minecraft world on Forge.
body:
This mod adds a collection of original stalkers and monsters to Minecraft. These creatures are inspired by the style of monsters often featured in horror and adventure videos created by YouTubers, while being adapted into unique Minecraft mobs.

Features:

Multiple custom stalker-type creatures
New hostile monsters with unique appearances and behaviors
Horror and suspense-themed gameplay
Forge support for easy installation and compatibility

If you enjoy exploring your world while facing unusual and frightening creatures, this mod adds new challenges and encounters to your Minecraft experience.

the mod is also on curse forge
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dontcry
